actions.script: var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { if (btns[i].textContent.indexOf('Continue with Google') !== -1) { btns[i].click(); return 'google_clicked'; } } return 'google_not_found';

await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 8000)); var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-email]'); if (account) { account.click(); return 'account_clicked'; } return 'account_not_found';

if ('${account_click}' === 'account_clicked') { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 10000)); return 'login_complete'; } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-email]'); if (account) { account.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 10000)); return 'account_clicked'; } return 'account_not_found';
